name: Kids' Toothbrush Holder Shark Blue - Pillowfort™: Fun Bathroom Accessory, Silicone, Animal Pattern
description: Make sure your kiddo sinks their teeth into good oral hygiene practices with this jaw-droppingly Shark Toothbrush Holder from Pillowfort™. This toothbrush holder boasts a shark silhouette with 3D teeth, fin and ear that provides essential storage while infusing their space with a fun, fin-tastic vibe! In a solid finish that blends seamlessly with a variety of different decor styles, you can pair this shark toothbrush holder with other coordinating bathroom accessories to create a whimsical bathroom for your kiddo.
